params.name: Smug's Chalice
params.description:
On Jun 30, 4728 BC, Smug invited John to appreciate the gold cup it guarded.
Smug the dragon liked to regularly display his treasures, a custom that has lasted for thousands of years. Anthropologist John was honored to be invited to document the event. A particular golden cup left an indelible impression on him. Light reflected off the cup brightly, lighting up dazzling jewels, weapons, armor, as well as the scales of the giant dragons. [Info] Faith: Morgoth Birthplace: Brand Birth Date: Firs …
